executives.name: James Taiclet
executives.background: Mr. Taiclet has served as Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Lockheed Martin since June 2020. He previously served as Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of American Tower Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Jesus Malave
executives.background: Mr. Malave has served as Chief Financial Officer since February 2022. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of L3Harris Technologies, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer (CFO)

executives.name: Frank St. John
executives.background: Mr. St. John has served as Chief Operating Officer since June 2020. He has held various leadership roles at Lockheed Martin for over 30 years.

executives.name: Evan Scott
executives.background: Mr. Scott has served as Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary since 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary
Vice President and CFO of Lockheed Martin Space; Vice President and Treasurer; Vice President and CFO of Missiles and Fire Control

executives.name: Bruce Carlson
executives.background: Retired General, U.S. Air Force and former Director of the National Reconnaissance Office.

executives.name: Christopher Kubasik
executives.background: Mr. Kubasik has served as Chair and Chief Executive Officer since June 2022. He previously served as Vice Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer from June 2021 to June 2022, and as Vice Chair, President and Chief Operating Officer from June 2019 to June 2021. Prior to the L3Harris merger, he was Chairman, President and CEO of L3 Technologies.

executives.name: Daniel Akerson
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of General Motors Company.

executives.name: David Burritt
executives.background: President and CEO of United States Steel Corporation.

executives.name: Debra Reed-Klages
executives.background: Former Executive Chairman, President and CEO of Sempra Energy.

executives.name: DeEtte Gray
executives.background: Ms. Gray has served as President of Business and Information Technology Solutions since 2017. Prior to CACI, she held leadership roles at BAE Systems.

tenure_dates.title: Various Executive/Management roles in IT services

executives.name: Gregory Dahlberg
executives.background: Gregory R. Dahlberg previously served as Senior Vice President for Strategic Planning at Lockheed Martin Corporation and as Under Secretary of the Army.

executives.name: Ilene Gordon
executives.background: Retired Chairman, President and CEO of Ingredion Incorporated.

executives.name: Jeh Johnson
executives.background: Partner at Paul, Weiss, Rifkind, Wharton & Garrison LLP and former U.S. Secretary of Homeland Security.

executives.name: John Donovan
executives.background: Former CEO of AT&T Communications, LLC. He has served on our board since September 2021.

executives.name: John Mengucci
executives.background: Mr. Mengucci has served as President and Chief Executive Officer of CACI since July 2019. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from 2012 to 2019. Before joining CACI, he held leadership positions at Lockheed Martin Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: President, Information Systems and Global Solutions (Civil and Defense segments)

executives.name: John Richardson
executives.background: Retired Admiral, U.S. Navy and former Chief of Naval Operations.

executives.name: Joseph Dunford, Jr.
executives.background: Retired General, U.S. Marine Corps and former Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff.

executives.name: Judith Marks
executives.background: Chair, CEO and President of Otis Worldwide Corporation.

executives.name: Linda Gooden
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President, Information Systems & Global Solutions of Lockheed Martin Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Information Systems & Global Solutions

executives.name: Marillyn Hewson
executives.background: Former Chairman, President and CEO of Lockheed Martin Corporation. Director since 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President, and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Maryanne Lavan
executives.background: Ms. Lavan is Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Lockheed Martin Corporation. She has held various leadership positions at Lockheed Martin since 1990.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Orlando Carvalho
executives.background: Mr. Carvalho previously served as Executive Vice President of Lockheed Martin's Aeronautics business area. He has over 38 years of experience in the aerospace and defense industry.

executives.name: Patricia Yarrington
executives.background: Retired Vice President and CFO of Chevron Corporation.

executives.name: Richard Ambrose
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President, Space of Lockheed Martin Corporation. He served in various leadership roles at Lockheed Martin from 2000 to 2022.

executives.name: Vicki Hollub
executives.background: President and CEO of Occidental Petroleum Corporation.
